violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Cutting boards on the cook line and the cutting board used for cutting bread on the server line have gouges and need to be repaired or replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The insides of multiple reach-in coolers need to be cleaned. The racking in the walk-in cooler needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Under the flattop and the shelving on the cook line need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. The racking holding the clean dish and kitchen utensils needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the kitchen and the prep areas need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing ceiling panels over food storage in the dry storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop in both mop sinks were not stored in a position to dry properly.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wood cutting boards on the saute station are cracked/damaged and non-cleanable surfaces.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in cooler drawers along the rails, the bottoms of the reach in coolers, underneath the flattop need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Side of the hood system in the back prep kitchen needs to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Bus tubs in the back prep kitchen that were used to hold lids for clean tubs need to be replaced and cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors on the cooking line need to be cleaned underneath the coolers and cooking equipment. Liquid pooling on the floor of the keg room needs to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)

Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
